## Entities.TasksLibrary class

Multi-source task library with type-safe access

Wraps AggregatedResultMap to provide: - Composite ID access (e.g., "common.melt-chocolate") - Multi-source management (built-in, user, app-local, etc.) - Mutable vs immutable collection distinction - Weakly-typed validating access for external data

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class TasksLibrary extends SubLibraryBase<TaskId, BaseTaskId, ITaskData> 
```
**Extends:** [SubLibraryBase](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.sublibrarybase.md)<!-- -->&lt;[TaskId](./ts-chocolate.taskid.md)<!-- -->, [BaseTaskId](./ts-chocolate.basetaskid.md)<!-- -->, [ITaskData](./ts-chocolate.entities.itaskdata.md)<!-- -->&gt;
